name: agentmint-lm-studio-benchmark
description: Run a local Qwen (or any OpenAI-compatible) model through AgentMint and diff it against an unguarded baseline.
//diag: Multi-model sweep: run `LM_STUDIO_MODEL=<id> npm run diag` once per model (e.g. qwen2.5-7b-instruct, llama-3.1-8b-instruct, qwen2.5-32b-instruct). Each writes analysis/output/RESULTS.md + results.json; diff results.json across models to see whether the thesis generalizes.

scripts.full: npm run baseline && npm run bench && npm run compare
